evidence.text: for MiniAppBench. Contains the complete pipeline and codebase for LLM-powered interactive HTML generation and agentic evaluation (MiniAppEval). # MiniAppBench: Evaluating the Shift from Text to Interactive HTML Responses in LLM-Powered Assistants > **Human-AI interaction is evolving from static text responses to dynamic, interactive applications.** **MiniAppBench** is the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate **principle-driven, interactive application generation**.
